description: Collaborated within a three-member engineering team to design and deliver IoT-based software products on the ThingsBoard PE platform.
highlights: Built an AI-powered chatbot integrating OpenAI GPT that reduced manual device data querying time by approximately 60%.
Contributed to SWatch360, a Flutter cross-platform mobile application for real-time IoT device monitoring and control.
Engineered multi-turn conversation memory with MySQL persistence.

description: Collaborated in a two-member team to architect and implement a real-time chat web application from the ground up.
highlights: Owned the Spring Boot backend by creating REST API endpoints.
Implemented core server-side business logic and WebSocket support.
Accelerated development through reusable service components.
